title: Rich Mexican Pecan Stir-Fry
description: A nut-free-friendly, rich and dense dish featuring black treacle and sous-vide techniques for a unique date-night Venezuelan flavor.

ingredients.name: pecans (unsalted)
ingredients.notes: chopped and coated in black treacle before cooking

ingredients.name: black treacle
ingredients.notes: baste pecans with treacle during sous-vide cooking process

ingredients.name: sugar (for browning)
ingredients.notes: used for caramelizing the treacle and enhancing flavors

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to a temperature of 60°C.
Mix black treacle and sugar together until fully dissolved. Brush this mixture onto the pecans.
Season the pecans with salt and freshly grated pepper before placing them in the sous-vade bag.
Cook the bagged pecans at 60°C for approximately 2 hours, basting occasionally to prevent sticking.
Once cooked, carefully remove the bag from the sous-vide machine. Let cool slightly and then separate the pecans.
Serve hot or at room temperature with a side of warm quinoa and sliced avocado.
